name: Approach
intuition_and_algorithm:
Odd numbers leave a remainder when divided by 2, while even numbers do not.
Use this property to determine the parity of a number.
If there's a remainder, the number is odd; if not, it's even.
This is a simple and direct way to distinguish between even and odd values.

complexities.time: O(1)  â The modulus operation takes constant time.
complexities.space: O(1)  â No extra space is required.
